textByHash.10974ef8f3cce30856d8f1325654d66f79c6847c: Ah Marley, my cousin. He's always getting himself into trouble!
textByHash.14b1e56df3b514e1a17fd17e5eaa279c53b7a0cb: Hmm... it's been a while since I've seen him. Last I heard he got caught in the middle of a robbery and had to flee Varrock.
textByHash.f5ec8b588d7dfe1eaa9d68e0bdfeaf02f55f8555: Something to do with trying to steal a set of Wizard robes from the museum.
textByHash.89a05b6ebf89784a01d111d89a98074abf5e0e2a: Afraid so. Marley is no stranger to the authorities... Knowing him, he's probably hanging out in Edgeville ruins till the attention dies down. I'd try there.
textByHash.d4c2f249b7a15db3ffc07843a9305c510cf0b830: Funny you should mention that...there is actually.
textByHash.09e36ac85aadf96c6dbbbb3e6c2d0c80ae0e3b05: The ruthless and notorious criminal gang known as the Black Arm Gang have their headquarters down there.
textByHash.efd42431947701d78c9ac7d7376b4f167ae35027: You never know. You'll find a lady down there called Katrine. Speak to her.
textByHash.add9c2d361e0052a96647be406167982fc56f779: But don't upset her, she's pretty dangerous.
textByHash.d8f26b07d9d486d97d60a1261ec9c2474ce2acdc: Sure. I know everything there is to know about this city. I'd be happy to tell you for 10 gold.
textByHash.780d4cfc0c547a95d1b7363c10b0d0ca3be27ee8: Now listen closely; to get to the Phoenix hideout, walk south from here and take the first road to the east. It's the one with the Blue moon pub on the corner. Take the first alley leading south off of that road and you'll
textByHash.77356d6fef63c4befa1027d90cf9c5dd3859582e: find the hideout at the end of that alley. It's called the VTAM corporation.
textByHash.18816539ee124e3f36dbf3e8318b29dd096bd0f1: Well you know where to find me if you get lost!
textByHash.cbea156725f55d67a8a47944ddef182d53d2c648: I guess that'll have to do then.
textByHash.31c301a5a992bb4eb3b2f71357a6c79e54d5f9b2: If you pay me the other 5 gold, I'll tell you.
textByHash.a4484120ecfe6b285e903a7d849dca3053329e34: Yeah, sure, whatever. You don't frighten me, pal.
textByHash.99e55064f3476511573798512d086f90a3b3558a: Your best bet would probably be to find someone else... Someone who ISN'T a member of the Black Arm Gang, and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Phoenix Gang for you.
textByHash.a0c0476fc6a12f1199281842da6620b2445f0064: I'm not just a pretty face!
textByHash.d750eb1a4c57944da883cb22915ff61540b9239a: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.
textByHash.e4a83efc5b7209e74de9c44681b3c7cd7662f82d: Funny you should mention that... Rumour has it that they have their headquarters right down this alleyway. Though if I were you, I'd be careful about messing with them...
textByHash.9df8470af163c0bc5e75f133a7950d9cc6bd69a9: Like I told you, the rumour is that they have their headquarters right down this alleyway. Though if I were you, I'd be careful about messing with them...
textByHash.ae2f49ca2bdb7e6523c69c17d1dccf5904aa460b: You never know. You'll find a lady down there called Katrine. Speak to her. But whatever you do, don't upset her.
textByHash.399372ebeab90d292191feb3b548c0f4647378d3: Sure, I know everything there is to know about this city. I'd be happy to tell you for ten coins.
textByHash.bea2687cd17de6d731b331bdcea30068a7734755: Perfect! Now listen closely. The Phoenix Gang can be found east of here. Take the southern alley past the Blue Moon Inn and look for a building owned by the VTAM corporation.
textByHash.c54f8174bd1c4b86f85e85bbea6ea16178552889: Their main hideout is in that building, with their weapon stash being two buildings east of it. Good luck getting into either without being a member of their gang though.
textByHash.39b5062b52adfa2f5ebd9099ce0878a0c7708421: Well, your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Black Arm Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Phoenix Gang for you.
textByHash.74e729701a5e683ca842ff19c71d728c1a428506: If you pay me five more coins, I'll tell you.
textByHash.ebcdd4b0433272443b6ee0b92418c48d22b910b3: Well, you know where to find me if you get lost!
textByHash.c2c07950dba17f9d75d7a1e832de9e11a969e1d4: Well, given you paid up, I guess I can remind you. The Phoenix Gang can be found east of here. Take the southern alley past the Blue Moon Inn and look for a building owned by the VTAM corporation.
textByHash.98baa5c8e1e19d8b6469733c5fe95b2a65b49293: No. You're a collaborator with the Phoenix Gang. There's no way they'll let you join.
textByHash.a555384715d3775c32cd6f48ef99b0e033f3231e: I've been known to have dealings with the Phoenix Gang. I wouldn't be very good at my job if I didn't know their members.
textByHash.49b3e844940db6a786a053ce997b97a35f2471fa: Your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Phoenix Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Black Arm Gang for you.
textByHash.3b45f47873bc169013048e782c532a5c19e06ea5: Charles. Charles E. Trampin' at your service. Now, about that change you were going to give me...
textByHash.92db68e84d7cadebbd3e7a2057376f01cf029e11: You startin? I hope your nose falls off!
textByHash.ef6f37209995284bdcf2828a0d83708d3e412099: Huh? What do you mean? That wasn't why I asked you for money.
textByHash.4420e7b88abc3d2dc40dd0c75b0256143dfb136d: I was under the impression you were already a member...
textByHash.16f601a51cab4ec4d98870e5bf6cfbf1b0226ab3: No. You're a collaborator with the Phoenix Gang. There's no way they'll let you join now.
textByHash.722b8e5d87b4b7c9d10bd063f1b0917074aac150: In my current profession I spend a lot of time on the streets and you hear these sorta things sometimes
textByHash.a23b33056d84a94a38286921765e59a76f4d9987: Your best bet would probably be to find someone else... Someone who ISN'T a member of the Phoenix Gang, and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Black Arm Gang for you.
textByHash.3b356628c2fa2e0346d7bae6da0ec93f07009f0c: If you find someone like that, tell 'em to come to me first.
textByHash.d97578ac05c322e6bb9db4004177262af8e404c0: Please , sir, can you help me.
textByHash.b191972a5cd4ef46baf172950a0874e021fe4ada: Please , madam, can you help me.
textByHash.46bc1a44cba4812c0f71a43c2d560ccd4744406e: I really need a cooked trout.
textByHash.e6e41bc05daf5be016b9c8caf6f322e9a21b2a25: I really need a cooked pike.
textByHash.60751ed3421840420d24a71905ede3d75a5ef3df: I really need a raw herring
textByHash.d0e851c469cc381619673dedc75d18341df8e968: I really need a raw trout.
textByHash.1bf3721894a19279ee2f28267eb28257452deafc: I really need some leather chaps.
textByHash.d4f9f0e3dec52edc84591de318b8e5dc30ee5756: I really need a leather body.
textByHash.8936daa817cfd26d707bdd21b010f1bd28b3b2f3: I really need an iron dagger.
textByHash.06114d9cf39213121e5fbe14dea2c57a80f88ddc: I really need a piece of iron ore.
